title: Physical mechanisms of ohmic contact and tunnel diode: A novel explanation in terms of impurity-photovoltaic-effect resulting from infrared self-emission at room-temperature
summary: A mechanism of quantum-mechanical tunneling is based on electron-wavefunction and is used to explain ohmic contact and tunnel diode. Tunneling is the important example of wave-particle duality. In this study, an attempt is made to explain these devices in particle description. As is well known, any object at room-temperature emits infrared (IR) photons due to blackbody radiation. The process of heavy doping can cause a lot of defects, e.g. vacancies and interstitials. The self-absorption of the IR emission could be achieved through sub-band-gap excitations due to defect-related levels in forbidden energy gap, creating carriers. In a heavily doped p-n junction diode, some of the IR-generated carriers diffuse into the junction which has a built-in field in a depletion layer. The built-in field then sweeps out the carriers, producing IR photocurrent. The IR photocurrent is regarded as the reverse current of the p-n junction according to the precedent where impurity-photovoltaic-effect is used to explain circuit devices (arXiv:2510.18226). Also, a reverse bias voltage increases depletion layer width, but carrier diffusion length out of the depletion layer remains unchanged, and more IR-generated carriers created in and near the depletion layer can contribute to the IR current. In addition, heavy doping results in not only a great many IR-generated carriers but also avalanche effect at low voltage. As a result, total reverse current dramatically increases with voltage, thus a Schottky diode can be altered to create an ohmic contact and a p-n diode can become a tunnel diode. Considering the wave-particle duality, the combination of quantum-mechanical and photovoltaic mechanisms is suggested to explain these devices. Each of the two mechanisms plays a big or small role in the explanation.

AI.tldr: 本文试图用量子隧穿和粒子描述来解释欧姆接触和隧道二极管的工作机制，结合红外光电效应和缺陷相关能级的作用，提出了一种新的解释方法。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在解决传统的基于电子波函数的量子隧穿机制在解释欧姆接触和隧道二极管时的局限性，尝试从粒子描述的角度提供新的解释，并结合红外光电效应和缺陷相关能级的作用。
AI.method: 通过分析重掺杂p-n结二极管中由于黑体辐射产生的红外光子及其自吸收过程，研究了红外光电流的产生机制。作者进一步探讨了反向偏压对耗尽层宽度的影响，并结合雪崩效应和载流子扩散长度的不变性，解释了反向电流随电压急剧增加的现象。
AI.result: 研究表明，红外光电流可以被视为p-n结的反向电流，而重掺杂不仅显著增加了红外光电流的产生，还导致了低电压下的雪崩效应，从而解释了欧姆接触和隧道二极管的行为。
AI.conclusion: 作者提出了一种结合量子力学和光伏效应的双机制解释方法，认为这两种机制在解释欧姆接触和隧道二极管时均发挥了重要作用。这种解释方法为理解这些器件的行为提供了新的视角。

title: A Computational Model for Flexoelectricity-Driven Contact Electrification
summary: Recent theoretical studies show that nanoscale contact on dielectric substrates can induce flexoelectric polarization large enough to drive electron transfer. This has been supported by experimental evidence, indicating that contact electrification is inherently a coupled electromechanical phenomenon. In this work, we develop a computational model for flexoelectricity-driven contact electrification that integrates finite-deformation flexoelectricity with contact mechanics and physically motivated charge transfer. A tunneling transparency function is introduced to regulate the interfacial channel based on the WKB approximation, capturing the irreversible charge trapping during unloading. Three contact scenarios are investigated with specific hypotheses for charge transfer: unbiased metal-dielectric contact driven by surface polarization, biased contact restricted to carriers of a single polarity, and dielectric-dielectric contact where surface states with finite capacity limit the transferable charge. The model is compared with atomic force microscopy measurements on PMMA and PDAP substrates under both biased and unbiased conditions.For contact between identical dielectric materials, we show that geometric asymmetry in surface curvature is sufficient to induce charge separation, with polarity reversal occurring at a critical surface wavenumber. Three-dimensional simulations on random rough surfaces reproduce the mosaic charge distributions observed experimentally, confirming that contact-induced local strain gradient heterogeneity can generate spatially non-uniform charge patterns without introducing any material inhomogeneity.

AI.tldr: 该论文开发了一个计算模型，用于研究由挠曲电效应驱动的接触带电现象，结合了有限变形挠曲电性、接触力学和物理驱动的电荷转移机制，并通过实验数据验证了模型的准确性。模型研究了三种接触情景，并揭示了表面曲率和应变梯度异质性对电荷分布的关键影响。
AI.motivation: 最近的实验和理论研究指出，纳米尺度接触可以诱导足够大的挠曲电极化以驱动电子转移，表明接触带电本质上是一种耦合的电机械现象。作者旨在通过开发一个计算模型，深入理解挠曲电效应在接触带电中的作用机制。
AI.method: 作者开发了一个计算模型，结合有限变形挠曲电性、接触力学和物理驱动的电荷转移机制。通过引入基于WKB近似的隧道透明度函数来调节界面通道，捕捉卸载过程中的不可逆电荷捕获。研究了三种接触情景：无偏压金属-电介质接触、受限单极性载流子的偏压接触以及电介质-电介质接触（受限于有限容量的表面态）。模型通过原子力显微镜在PMMA和PDAP基板上的测量数据进行了验证。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，在相同电介质材料接触时，表面曲率的几何不对称性足以诱导电荷分离，并且极性反转在临界表面波数处发生。三维模拟在随机粗糙表面上重现了实验中观察到的镶嵌电荷分布，证实了局部应变梯度异质性可以在不引入材料不均匀性的情况下产生空间非均匀的电荷图案。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过理论和实验的结合，揭示了挠曲电效应在接触带电中的核心作用，证明了表面曲率和应变梯度异质性是电荷分布的关键因素。这一发现为理解接触带电的物理机制提供了新的视角。

title: Comprehensive Optical, Electrical and Humidity Sensing Properties of Bifidobacterium infantis 35624 Thin Films
summary: In this study, we present a comprehensive investigation of the structural, optical, and electrical properties of Bifidobacterium longum subsp. longum 35624 (BB35) thin films, and demonstrate their application as a novel relative humidity sensor. UV-Visible spectroscopy revealed that BB35 exhibits two distinct optical absorption regions, corresponding to direct band gaps of 2.1 \pm 0.05 eV and 2.8 \pm 0.05 eV, as confirmed by Tauc plot analysis, establishing BB35 as a genuine wide-bandgap semiconductor material. Photoluminescence measurements under 280 nm excitation exhibited a broad emission spectrum, which was deconvoluted into four Gaussian peaks centered at 434 nm (2.86 eV), 499 nm (2.48 eV), 543 nm (2.3 eV), and 620 nm (2.0 eV), indicating the presence of multiple radiative recombination centers characteristic of semiconducting materials. Electrical characterization revealed dispersive charge transport with current decay following a power-law I \propto t^{-α} (α\approx 0.3), suggesting Poole-Frenkel conduction mechanism typically observed in disordered organic semiconductors. The relative humidity (RH) sensing performance of BB35 films was evaluated using gold interdigital electrodes across 15-90% RH range. The sensor exhibited reversible response with sensitivity increasing linearly from 0.85 to 4.80 as RH increased from 15% to 90%. The devices demonstrated excellent stability over two months with less than 5% degradation in baseline current. These results establish BB35 thin films as a promising eco-friendly semiconducting material for humidity sensing applications and open new avenues for integrating biological materials into electronic and optoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本研究对Bifidobacterium longum subsp. longum 35624（BB35）薄膜的结构、光学和电学性质进行了全面研究，并展示了其作为新型湿度传感器的应用潜力。实验表明BB35具有宽带隙半导体特性，并通过光电性能分析验证了其在湿度传感中的优异表现。
AI.motivation: 探索BB35薄膜作为新型环保半导体材料的潜力，特别是其在湿度传感领域的应用，以推动生物材料在电子和光电器件中的集成。
AI.method: 研究采用UV-Visible光谱、Tauc图分析、光致发光测量和电学表征等方法，系统分析了BB35的光学和电学特性。湿度传感性能通过金叉指电极在15%-90%相对湿度范围内测试。
AI.result: BB35薄膜表现出优异的湿度传感性能，灵敏度随湿度升高线性增加（0.85至4.80），且器件在两个月内的稳定性良好（基线电流退化小于5%）。
AI.conclusion: BB35薄膜是一种具有潜力的环保半导体材料，适用于湿度传感应用，为生物材料在电子和光电器件中的集成提供了新思路。

title: Loss-Optimized Reconfigurable Nonlocal Metasurface-aided Cavity Antenna
summary: This paper presents the design and experimental demonstration of a reconfigurable cavity excited nonlocal metasurface antenna capable of wide angle dynamic beam steering. The antenna is synthesized using a volume surface integral equation based framework that rigorously captures nonlocal mutual coupling among metasurface unit cells. To ensure physical consistency, the numerically characterized resistance and reactance relationship of the tunable unit cells is directly incorporated into the synthesis, enabling precise far-field synthesis while minimizing Ohmic losses. The proposed approach is applied to a 10 GHz cavity fed metasurface antenna composed of 24 independently controlled varactor-loaded unit cells. Numerical simulations and near-field measurements demonstrate stable beam steering with a range of 80 degrees across broadside with excellent agreement between measured and simulated radiation patterns. These results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework for the realization of compact, reconfigurable cavity-excited metasurface antennas.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于可调谐单元的可重构腔激非局域超表面天线设计方法，并通过实验证明了其广角动态波束指向能力。
AI.motivation: 论文旨在解决传统天线在动态波束指向方面存在的高损耗和非局域耦合的问题，通过开发一种新型超表面天线，结合可调谐单元和非局域耦合的精确建模，以实现高效、紧凑的动态波束控制。
AI.method: 论文采用体积表面积分方程框架合成天线，严格捕捉超表面单元之间的非局域耦合效应。同时，直接引入可调谐单元电阻和电抗关系的数值特性，以确保物理一致性，从而实现精确的远场合成并最小化欧姆损耗。
AI.result: 研究提出了一种10 GHz腔激超表面天线，由24个独立控制的变容二极管加载单元组成。数值模拟和近场测量结果表明，天线能够在80度的范围内稳定地进行波束指向，测量与模拟辐射模式之间存在高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过理论与实验的结合，证明了所提出的框架在实现紧凑、可重构的腔激超表面天线方面的有效性，为未来高频动态波束控制应用提供了新的设计思路。

title: Cavity enhanced UV combs generated by sum frequency mixing with near-IR chirped-pulse electro-optic combs for Rb atom sensing at 323 nm
summary: A chirped-pulse electro-optic (EO) dual comb system operating near 821 nm is used to generate cavity enhanced dual combs in the ultraviolet (UV) region near 323 nm with an optical bandwidth of up to 90 GHz. The UV combs result from intracavity sum frequency mixing of the non-resonant near-IR combs with a cavity enhanced field at 532 nm in a nonlinear crystal. The cavity is pumped with 1 W at 532 nm and seeded with less than 10 mW in the near-IR region to generate a few uW of UV power within a detection bandwidth of < 20 MHz. The UV power is enhanced by 100-fold relative to single pass methods and is readily detectable using an avalanche photodiode. The system is used to measure the high-resolution UV comb spectra of Rb atoms near 323 nm (9 2P3/2 <- 5 2S1/2). This method is easily extendable across the 300 nm to 400 nm region using telecom and near-IR dual EO comb sources for seeding.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了一种使用啁啾脉冲电光双梳系统在紫外区域（323 nm附近）产生腔增强双梳的方法，并通过非线性晶体中的腔内和频混频实现了高达90 GHz的带宽。紫外光功率较单通方法提升了100倍，并成功用于测量Rb原子的高分辨率紫外光谱。该方法可扩展到300 nm至400 nm的范围。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在解决紫外区域高分辨率光谱测量中功率低和检测难度大的问题。传统方法在紫外区域的功率较低，难以实现高分辨率的测量。通过腔增强技术和双梳系统的结合，作者希望提高紫外光的功率并简化检测过程。
AI.method: 作者采用啁啾脉冲电光双梳系统，结合腔增强技术和非线性晶体的和频混频过程，生成紫外区域的双梳光谱。具体包括：1）使用532 nm的泵浦光和近红外区域的种子光；2）通过非线性晶体实现和频混频；3）利用腔增强技术将紫外光功率提升100倍。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，紫外光的功率较单通方法提升了100倍，带宽达到90 GHz，并成功测得了Rb原子的高分辨率紫外光谱。系统的检测带宽小于20 MHz，紫外光功率可达几微瓦。
AI.conclusion: 作者得出结论，该方法不仅显著提高了紫外区域的功率和分辨率，还可扩展到更宽的波长范围（300 nm至400 nm）。这为紫外光谱的高分辨率测量提供了一种高效且易于实现的技术方案。

title: The Taguchi method for optimizing nonlinear pulse propagation in optical fibers
summary: Understanding the nuances of nonlinear pulse propagation in optical fibers has led to several impactful applications across domains like optical communications, sensing and biophotonics. A key aspect in this regard is the use of appropriate optimization strategies for attaining requisite performance parameters. In this paper, we present the Taguchi method as a viable tool for optimizing nonlinear pulse propagation in optical fibers. We show that its use of the orthogonal arrays leads to rapid convergences to the desired pulse parameters, with even faster convergences obtained by favouring exploitation over exploration. We demonstrate the application of the method using two well-known problems from the field - the guiding center soliton, and soliton order conservation in dispersion decreasing fibers - which serve to underscore its salient features and also its potential for solution discovery across nonlinear pulse propagation problems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何在光纤中优化非线性脉冲传播的问题，提出使用田口方法作为一种有效的优化工具，并通过正交数组实现快速收敛，展示了该方法在两个经典问题中的应用。
AI.motivation: 非线性脉冲传播在光纤中的复杂特性对于光学通信、传感和生物光子学等多个领域具有重要应用价值。然而，如何高效优化脉冲传播参数以实现所需的性能指标仍然是一个关键问题。本文旨在探索一种更高效的优化策略来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 作者提出使用田口方法（Taguchi method）来优化光纤中的非线性脉冲传播。该方法利用正交数组（orthogonal arrays）实现快速收敛，同时通过倾向于“利用”而非“探索”的策略进一步加速收敛过程。文中还通过两个经典问题（引导中心孤子和色散递减光纤中的孤子阶数守恒）展示了该方法的实际应用。
AI.result: 研究表明，田口方法能够有效优化非线性脉冲传播参数，并且通过正交数组和倾向于“利用”的策略，其收敛速度更快。该方法在两个经典问题中的应用也证明了其在解决非线性脉冲传播问题中的潜力和广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文得出结论，田口方法是一种高效且实用的工具，可用于优化光纤中的非线性脉冲传播。其快速收敛的特性以及在不同问题中的适用性，使其成为该领域的一个有力解决方案，并为未来研究提供了新的方向。

title: Impact of refractive index heterogeneity on stimulated Brillouin scattering microscopy: a quantitative analysis
comment: Submitted version of paper published in Optics Letters
summary: Stimulated Brillouin scattering (SBS) microscopy enables label-free biomechanical imaging, with Brillouin gain serving as a critical contrast parameter for quantitative analysis. However, the influence of sample-induced refractive index (RI) heterogeneity on gain measurements remains poorly understood. Here, we quantitatively investigate, how RI mismatch affects SBS microscopy using finite element simulations and experiments on a phantom sample comprising polydimethylsiloxane beads embedded in agarose gel. We demonstrate that RI heterogeneity induces focal field distortion that reduce pump-probe beam overlap, resulting in attenuated Brillouin gain and degraded shift precision at material interfaces. Crucially, we establish that fiber-coupling efficiency, commonly used for system alignment, cannot serve as a linear proxy for Brillouin gain due to its heightened sensitivity to focal field distortion.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了样品诱导的折射率（RI）异质性对受激布里渊散射（SBS）显微镜中布里渊增益测量的影响，发现RI不匹配会导致聚焦场畸变，从而降低泵浦-探针光束重叠，并削弱布里渊增益和位移精度。此外，研究发现光纤耦合效率不能作为布里渊增益的线性代理。
AI.motivation: 受激布里渊散射（SBS）显微技术为无标记生物力学成像提供了可能，其中布里渊增益是定量分析的关键参数。然而，样品诱导的折射率异质性对增益测量的影响尚未得到充分理解。为了解决这一问题，本文旨在定量探究RI不匹配如何影响SBS显微技术。
AI.method: 作者采用有限元模拟和实验相结合的方法，研究对象为聚二甲基硅氧烷（PDMS）珠子嵌入琼脂糖凝胶的幻影样品，通过这种模型定量分析了RI异质性对SBS显微技术的影响。
AI.result: 研究表明，RI异质性会导致聚焦场畸变，从而减少泵浦-探针光束的重叠区域，最终导致布里渊增益的衰减和位移精度的下降。进一步发现，光纤耦合效率（常用于系统对准）对聚焦场畸变高度敏感，不能作为布里渊增益的线性代理参数。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了RI异质性对SBS显微技术的负面影响，强调了在实际应用中需考虑RI异质性对增益测量的干扰。此外，研究否定了光纤耦合效率作为布里渊增益代理参数的可行性，为未来SBS显微技术的优化提供了重要的理论指导和实验依据。

title: Spatio-Temporal Scintillation Mitigation via Polarizations Coupled Higher-Order Correlation
summary: We present a unified theoretical framework linking second and fourth order statistical correlations of stochastic electromagnetic beams to the scintillation index observed after propagation through Kolmogorov atmospheric turbulence. We derive the beam coherence polarization matrix and its propagation law in a random medium. An algebraic connection is established between the second order polarization matrix J, its fourth order Gram counterpart obtained from the square of J, the classical degree of polarization P, the fourth order degree of polarization, and the scintillation index of the beam intensity. A key result is a closed form purity relation connecting the trace of the squared polarization matrix to the square of its trace, which shows that unpolarized natural beams exhibit a large scintillation index. The analysis demonstrates that scintillation can be reduced by polarizing the beam using suitable polarizer sets. This reduction occurs independently of the atmospheric turbulence strength parameter. Experimental results further show that simultaneous control of coherence and polarization, achievable using a pseudo random phase plate, provides a practical approach for minimizing scintillation in free space optical communication links.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种理论框架，将随机电磁光束的二阶和四阶统计相关性与Kolmogorov大气湍流中的闪烁指数联系起来，并通过理论推导和实验验证展示了偏振对降低闪烁指数的作用。
AI.motivation: 动机在于理解并控制大气湍流中光束的闪烁现象，这对自由空间光通信系统的性能至关重要。作者旨在揭示偏振和相干性如何共同影响光束的闪烁指数，从而提供一种减少闪烁的实用方法。
AI.method: 方法包括理论推导和实验验证。首先，作者建立了光束相干偏振矩阵及其在随机介质中的传播定律，揭示了二阶偏振矩阵J与其四阶Gram形式之间的关系。然后，通过代数方法将闪烁指数与偏振特性联系起来。实验部分使用了伪随机相位板同时控制光束的相干性和偏振状态。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，偏振光束的闪烁指数显著降低，这一效果不受大气湍流强度的影响。理论和实验均证明了通过偏振控制和相干性调节可以有效减少闪烁，特别是在自由空间光通信中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出，偏振和相干性的协同控制是降低光束闪烁指数的有效策略。该方法不仅具有理论意义，还能为实际光学通信系统提供实用的解决方案。

title: Stability analysis and quantum-limited noise properties of the Soliton-similariton fiber laser
summary: Soliton-similariton fiber lasers have demonstrated exceptional operational stability, maintaining continuous mode-locking for weeks despite large intracavity spectral and temporal breathing. We present the first stability study of this laser, rigorously establishing that the anomalous dispersion segment that supports the soliton is the cause of this robustness. Specifically, we perform linear stability analysis of the laser employing a Jacobian-based eigenvalue decomposition and show that the eigenvalues lie within the unit circle, leading to a positive stability margin, which is indicative of the robustness of the laser against small perturbations. Furthermore, the stability margin is observed to increase with the length of the anomalous fiber segment, clearly establishing its role in pulse stabilization. Critically, integrated pulse timing jitter and relative intensity noise as obtained from quantum noise-limited laser simulations are shown to be anti-correlated to the stability margin, further validating the results of the Jacobian analysis and establishing an unequivocal link between the reported noise performance of the soliton-similariton laser to the underlying pulse stabilization mechanism mediated by the anomalous segment. The direct link of the linear stability analysis to the underlying nonlinear physics of the laser, together with its significantly lower computational overhead, establishes it as a highly effective predictive framework for assessing laser noise performance, enabling novel approaches for designing quantum noise-limited ultrafast sources.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次研究了孤子-相似子光纤激光器的稳定性问题，揭示了反常色散段是激光器鲁棒性的关键因素，并通过雅可比矩阵特征值分解分析，证明其稳定性与反常色散段的长度正相关，同时验证了稳定性与脉冲时间抖动和相对强度噪声的关联性。此外，该线性稳定性分析方法为设计量子噪声极限的超快光源提供了高效预测框架。
AI.motivation: 孤子-相似子光纤激光器在实验中表现出极高的稳定性，但其稳定性机制尚不明确。本文旨在通过理论分析，明确反常色散段对激光器稳定性的作用，并建立一种高效的预测框架，以验证和优化激光器的噪声性能。
AI.method: 作者采用基于雅可比矩阵的特征值分解方法进行线性稳定性分析，通过计算特征值是否位于单位圆内来判断稳定性。此外，通过数值模拟量化了脉冲时间抖动和相对强度噪声，验证了稳定性分析结果。
AI.result: 分析表明，反常色散段的长度与稳定性裕度正相关，且脉冲时间抖动和相对强度噪声与稳定性裕度负相关。通过数值模拟验证了这一关系，并表明线性稳定性分析方法在计算效率和预测准确性上具有优势。
AI.conclusion: 反常色散段是孤子-相似子光纤激光器稳定性的关键因素，其长度直接决定了激光器的鲁棒性。此外，线性稳定性分析方法高效、精确，为设计和优化量子噪声极限的超快光源提供了新思路。

title: Geometry-Controlled Excitonic Emission Engineering in Monolayer MoS2 Using Plasmonic Hollow Nanocavities
summary: Spectral control of closely spaced excitonic transitions is essential for valleytronic photonics, nanoscale light sources, and wavelength-encoded sensing. In monolayer molybdenum disulfide (MoS2), the A and B excitons are separated by only tens of meV, making spectral engineering both fundamentally important and technologically challenging. Here, we numerically investigate plasmon-enhanced excitonic emission in MoS2 coupled to vertically oriented hollow gold nanocylindrical cavities separated by a dielectric spacer. Finite-difference time-domain simulations combined with a photoluminescence-rate framework allow independent evaluation of excitation enhancement, radiative decay modification, non-radiative quenching, and excitonic charge generation. By tuning the cavity aspect ratio, the localized surface plasmon resonance is aligned with either the A or B excitonic transition, while spacer thickness and refractive index regulate near-field confinement and the local density of optical states. Under optimized conditions, excitation rates reach 4.34-fold enhancement while radiative decay exceeds 40-fold, producing photoluminescence increases of 143.85 and 87.27 times for the A and B excitons. The cavity also redistributes the relative intensities of the excitonic peaks, yielding normalized exciton peak ratios up to 2.4 compared to bare MoS2. These results establish hollow plasmonic nanocavities as a geometry-tunable platform for controlling excitonic emission and charge generation in atomically thin semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过等离子体增强来调控单层二硫化钼（MoS2）中紧密排列的A和B激子跃迁的发射光谱，利用空心金纳米圆柱腔与MoS2耦合，实现了激子发射的光谱控制和增强。
AI.motivation: 单层MoS2中的A和B激子跃迁间距仅为几十meV，这种紧密的光谱间距对光谱工程提出了技术挑战，同时在谷电子学光子学、纳米光源和波长编码传感等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 作者通过数值模拟研究了空心金纳米圆柱腔与MoS2耦合的系统，利用时域有限差分（FDTD）模拟和光致发光速率框架，独立评估了激发增强、辐射衰减修正、非辐射淬灭和激子电荷生成的效应。通过调节腔体纵横比，将局域表面等离子体共振与A或B激子跃迁对齐，同时通过介质间隔层的厚度和折射率调控近场限制和光学态局域密度。
AI.result: 在优化条件下，激发速率增强了4.34倍，辐射衰减超过40倍，A和B激子的光致发光强度分别提高了143.85倍和87.27倍。此外，腔体还重新分配了激子峰的相对强度，与裸MoS2相比，归一化激子峰比率高达2.4。
AI.conclusion: 空心等离子体纳米腔作为一种几何可调的平台，能够有效调控原子级薄半导体中的激子发射和电荷生成，为光谱工程提供了新的技术途径。

title: Spatiotemporal Stabilization of Turbulence-Distorted Gaussian Beams via Waveguide Spatial Filtering
summary: Optical beams propagating through atmospheric turbulence undergo spatiotemporal intensity fluctuations that deviate significantly from an ideal Gaussian profile. In this work, we present a unified theoretical and experimental framework for quantifying and mitigating these turbulence-induced distortions by coupling a higher-order statistical characterization technique with optical waveguide spatial filtering. The statistical characterization employs a Cholesky-whitened Gram--Charlier expansion that decomposes the two-dimensional beam intensity distribution into a Gaussian core augmented by third- and fourth-order cumulant corrections, thereby isolating skewness and excess kurtosis as quantitative non-Gaussianity indicators. Concurrently, the propagation of the distorted beam through a dielectric waveguide is analyzed to demonstrate that higher-order spatial modes, which carry the dominant share of turbulence-induced structural distortions, encounter a cutoff condition governed by the normalized frequency parameter and subsequently undergo exponential attenuation along the propagation direction. The waveguide thus acts as a passive spatial mode filter that selectively transmits the fundamental guided mode while suppressing radiative higher-order modes. The fitted beam volume, derived from the Gram--Charlier intensity model, serves as a unified scalar diagnostic that tracks the frame-by-frame evolution of turbulence-induced structural changes. Experimental measurements validate the theoretical predictions, demonstrating a substantial reduction in intensity fluctuations and a recovery of Gaussian beam statistics after waveguide propagation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高阶统计表征技术和光学波导空间滤波的统一理论与实验框架，用于量化和减轻大气湍流引起的光束畸变，实验验证了该方法在减少强度波动和恢复高斯光束统计特性方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流会导致光学光束的时空强度波动，使其显著偏离理想的高斯分布。为了解决这一问题，本文旨在量化这些湍流引起的畸变，并通过光学方法减轻其对光束传播的影响。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种统一的理论和实验方法：（1）使用Cholesky-白化的Gram-Charlier展开进行高阶统计表征，将二维光束强度分布分解为高斯核心叠加三阶和四阶累积量修正；（2）利用介电波导的空间滤波特性，通过切断高阶空间模的选择性传输，实现对湍流畸变的抑制。该方法通过拟合的光束体积作为标量诊断指标，跟踪湍流引起的结构变化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够显著减少强度波动，并在波导传播后恢复高斯光束的统计特性，验证了理论预测的准确性。波导被证明是一种有效的被动空间模滤波器，能够选择性传输基模并抑制高阶模。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过结合高阶统计表征和光学波导滤波技术，成功量化并减轻了大气湍流引起的光束畸变。实验验证了该方法在恢复光束高斯统计特性和减少强度波动方面的有效性，为光学通信和成像系统中的湍流补偿提供了一种新的解决方案。

title: Interleaved diffractive networks for information transfer through random diffusers
summary: Transferring optical information through random diffusers is a critical yet challenging task. In this work, we introduce a cascaded diffractive optical network for information transfer through random and unknown diffusers, achieved through a series of passive, structured layers physically interleaved within the scattering medium. These interleaved diffractive layers are optimized to mitigate the scattering process without requiring digital computing. The performance of this all-optical system was quantified as a function of several physical parameters, including the diffractive processor's depth, the physical layout of the diffractive layers, and the statistical properties of the scattering medium. To further enhance the performance and robustness of information transfer through a scattering medium, we also developed a hybrid (optical-digital) system that coupled the diffractive processor with a jointly trained digital neural network, which was shown to achieve superior reconstruction fidelity even when the input object information was subjected to unknown random rotations, shifts, and scaling. We also experimentally validated this system using a fabricated multi-layer diffractive system in the visible spectrum, demonstrating reliable information recovery through random diffuser layers. Our numerical and experimental results demonstrate the capabilities of an interleaved diffractive processor architecture to recover optical information through volumetric diffusive media, which can find applications in biomedical imaging, telecommunications, and remote sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种级联衍射光学网络，用于通过随机和未知的散射介质传输光学信息，并通过被动结构层优化散射过程。此外，还开发了一种混合（光学-数字）系统，结合数字神经网络进一步提升性能。
AI.motivation: 通过随机散射介质传输光学信息是一个重要但具有挑战性的任务，传统方法需要复杂的计算和后处理。本文旨在开发一种无需数字计算的纯光学解决方案，并通过混合系统提高重建质量。
AI.method: 方法包括设计级联衍射光学网络，将被动结构层嵌入散射介质中以优化散射过程。此外，还提出了一种混合系统，结合光学处理器和联合训练的数字神经网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，纯光学系统能够有效抵消散射效应，而混合系统在处理未知的随机旋转、平移和缩放时表现出更高的重建保真度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的级联衍射光学网络和混合系统能够高效恢复通过散射介质的光学信息，并在生物医学成像、通信和遥感等领域具有潜在应用价值。

title: The Bragg Frequency Convertor: A Meeting Between Spatial and Temporal Periodicities For Selective Parametric Frequency Translation
summary: This study introduces the Bragg Frequency Convertor, a spatial-temporal-periodic grating that extends the concept of conventional Bragg gratings into the dynamic domain to achieve pure parametric frequency conversion. By time-modulating either the high-index or low-index layers of a quarter-wave Bragg grating, we demonstrate selective and directional frequency conversion: Modulation of the high-index layers selectively yields down-conversion, whereas modulation of the low-index layers leads to up-conversion. Such a pure frequency conversion emerges from the synergistic interplay of spatial and temporal periodicities. The output is thus dominated by the converted frequency, with the carrier and undesired time harmonics suppressed. We derive a coupled-mode theory explaining such a layer-dependent phase matching and validate it with full-wave simulations, showing tunable conversion efficiency via modulation phase. The advance presented here lies in recognizing the conventional Bragg grating not as a passive partner but as an enabling scaffold: its intrinsic spatial periodicity is exploited to impose the precise spectral constraints required for efficient temporal modulation and the generation of pure parametrically converted signals. This work establishes temporal Bragg gratings as a versatile platform for reconfigurable and spurious-free frequency conversion, with applications in optical systems, signal processing, spectral engineering, and quantum photonics.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了布拉格频率转换器（Bragg Frequency Convertor），这是一种时空周期性光栅，将传统布拉格光栅的概念扩展到动态领域，以实现纯参数频率转换。通过时间调制布拉格光栅的高折射率或低折射率层，实现了选择性定向频率转换（高折射率层调制产生下转换，低折射率层调制产生上转换）。这种纯频率转换源于空间和时间周期性的协同作用，输出以转换后的频率为主，同时抑制载波和不必要的时间谐波。论文推导了耦合模式理论来解释层相关的相位匹配，并通过全波仿真验证了调制相位对转换效率的可调性。
AI.motivation: 传统的布拉格光栅通常被视为被动设备，主要依赖于空间周期性实现滤波或反射功能。然而，作者意识到布拉格光栅的内在空间周期性可以被进一步利用，通过时间调制实现高效的参数频率转换，从而扩展其应用范围。这一突破为解决现有光学系统中频率转换效率低、信号纯度不足等问题提供了新思路。
AI.method:
论文提出了布拉格频率转换器的设计方法：
1. 时间调制布拉格光栅的高折射率或低折射率层，分别实现下转换和上转换。
2. 利用空间和时间周期性的协同作用抑制载波和不必要的时间谐波，生成纯净的转换信号。
3. 推导耦合模式理论来解释层相关的相位匹配机制。
4. 通过全波仿真验证调制相位对转换效率的影响。
AI.result:
论文的主要结果包括：
1. 成功展示了选择性频率转换，高折射率层调制产生下转换，低折射率层调制产生上转换。
2. 转换效率可通过调制相位进行调谐，且输出信号以转换后的频率为主，载波和不必要谐波被显著抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该论文通过将布拉格光栅从被动设备转变为主动功能平台，实现了高效、纯净的参数频率转换。这一发现为光学系统、信号处理、谱工程和量子光子学等领域提供了新的工具和方法，同时也展示了时空周期性结构的巨大潜力。

title: Scalable optical neural network with nonlocally coupled coherent photonic processor
summary: Optical neural networks (ONNs) based on programmable photonic integrated circuits (PICs) offer a promising route toward low-latency and energy-efficient deep learning. However, conventional photonic implementations of matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) rely on locally connected architectures, such as Mach-Zehnder interferometer (MZI) meshes, whose number of active components scales quadratically with matrix size, severely limiting scalability. Here, we present a scalable ONN that overcomes this limitation by exploiting the intrinsically diffractive and nonlocal nature of coherent light inside a silicon photonic chip. Our approach employs cascaded stages of multiport directional couplers (MDCs) interleaved with compact phase-shifter arrays, enabling strong nonlocal coupling among multiple optical modes. We show that an MDC-based optical unitary converter (OUC) requires only $3N$ phase shifters to achieve uniform coverage over the $N$-dimensional complex unitary group, in stark contrast to the $O(N^2)$ scaling of conventional MZI meshes. Based on the singular value decomposition, we demonstrate that an $N\times N$ MVM can be realized using only $7N$ phase shifters, breaking the traditional $O(N^2)$ scaling barrier. We experimentally implement a 32-input silicon photonic MVM chip with a tenfold reduction in active components and validate its performance on various classification tasks. Our results establish a practical pathway toward large-scale, energy-efficient, and reconfigurable photonic neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于硅光子芯片的高效光学神经网络（ONN），通过利用相干光的衍射和非局域特性，显著减少了矩阵向量乘法（MVM）所需的相位调制器数量，从而解决了传统方法中组件数量随矩阵规模平方增长的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的光学神经网络（ONN）在实现矩阵向量乘法（MVM）时，依赖于局部连接的架构（如马赫-曾德尔干涉仪网格），其主动组件数量随矩阵规模的平方增长，导致可扩展性受限。作者旨在提出一种更高效、可扩展的ONN实现方案。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种基于级联多端口定向耦合器（MDC）和紧凑相位调制器阵列的方法，利用光的非局域耦合特性，实现了复杂酉群的均匀覆盖。通过奇异值分解（SVD），他们展示了仅需7N个相位调制器即可完成N×N的MVM运算。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在32输入硅光子MVM芯片上实现了主动组件数量的十倍减少，并在多种分类任务中验证了其性能。相比传统方法，这种方法突破了组件数量平方增长的屏障。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究为大尺度、高能效和可重构的光学神经网络提供了一条实用路径，为未来光学计算的发展奠定了基础。

title: Quantum Tunneling Enables High-Flux Transport in Ion Channels
summary: Classical molecular dynamics and electro-diffusion theories have achieved profound success in elucidating ion selectivity and gating mechanisms. However, reconciling strict selectivity with high flux permeation in Angstrom-scaled biological ion channels poses a universal challenge in nanoscale physics, as classical models consistently underestimate single-channel conductance. Using a non perturbative quantum transport framework, we calculate the ion permeation dynamics through the selectivity filter within a transfer matrix formalism. We demonstrate that quantum tunneling allows ions to bypass classical Arrhenius suppression, quantitatively recovering the experimental conductance of Na+ and K+ channels. Crucially, our findings reveal that the exploitation of quantum mechanics is a fundamental prerequisite for achieving macroscopic physiological efficiency. By reframing ion channels as mesoscopic quantum conductors, this work establishes a transformative paradigm in quantum biology and predicts distinct transport resonances in the terahertz regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个量子传输框架，用于解释生物离子通道中严格的离子选择性与高通透性之间的矛盾，指出经典模型低估单通道电导的问题。
AI.motivation: 经典的分子动力学和电扩散理论在解释离子选择性和门控机制方面取得了显著成功，但在解释纳米尺度生物离子通道中严格选择性与高通量渗透之间的矛盾时显得不足，尤其是经典模型始终低估单通道电导。作者试图通过引入量子力学的视角来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 作者采用了一种非微扰量子传输框架，通过转移矩阵形式计算离子通过选择性过滤器的动态过程。具体来说，他们展示了量子隧穿效应如何使离子绕过经典的阿伦尼乌斯抑制，从而定量恢复实验观察到的Na+和K+通道的电导。
AI.result: 研究发现，量子效应的利用是实现宏观生理效率的基本前提。通过将离子通道重新定义为介观量子导体，这项研究不仅定量恢复了实验观察到的电导，还揭示了量子力学在生物系统中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究在量子生物学中建立了一个新的范式，预测了太赫兹范围内的独特传输共振。通过证明量子效应对离子通道功能的关键作用，这项工作为理解生物系统中的纳米尺度现象提供了新的视角。

title: Boundary-Driven Exceptional Points in Photonic Waveguide Lattices
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, Supplemental document not included, accepted for publication in Optics Letters (https://doi.org/10.1364/OL.589791)
summary: We predict and analyze boundary-driven exceptional points in semi-infinite Hermitian photonic waveguide lattices with a side-coupled defect. The exceptional points arise from coherent reflections at the lattice termination, which induce strong memory effects in the defect dynamics. Using an exact analytic approach, we derive the defect's non-Markovian memory kernel, revealing the trajectories and coalescence conditions of the resonances, which can be precisely tuned by the defect position and the coupling strength. Our results provide a simple and experimentally accessible platform for exploring memory-enabled non-Hermitian physics in Hermitian photonic lattices.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了半无限厄米光子波导晶格中由边界驱动的例外点，并通过侧耦合缺陷展示了这些例外点如何由于相干反射和强记忆效应而产生。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在解决如何在一个完全厄米系统中实现和调控非厄米物理现象的问题。通过研究边界驱动的例外点，论文探索了一种在传统厄米系统中模拟非厄米行为的新方法。
AI.method: 论文采用精确的解析方法，推导了缺陷的非马尔可夫记忆核，揭示了共振的轨迹和合并条件。通过调整缺陷位置和耦合强度，可以实现对这些特性的精确调控。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，通过边界驱动的例外点和记忆效应，可以在厄米光子晶格中实现非厄米物理现象。这种方法为实验研究提供了一个简单且易于操作的平台。
AI.conclusion: 论文得出结论，通过边界驱动的例外点和记忆核的调控，可以在厄米系统中模拟非厄米行为，为相关研究提供了新的实验和理论工具。

title: AI based design of 2D material integrated optical polarizers
summary: On-chip integration of highly anisotropic two-dimensional (2D) materials offers new opportunities for realizing high performance polarization selective devices. Obtaining optimized designs for such devices requires extensively sweeping large parameter spaces, which in conventional approaches relies on massive mode simulations that demand considerable computational resources. Here, we address this limitation by developing a machine learning (ML) model based on fully connected neural networks (FCNNs). Trained by using mode simulation results for low resolution structural parameters, the FCNN model can accurately predict polarizer figures of merits (FOMs) for high resolution parameters and rapidly map the global variation trend across the entire parameter space. We test the performance of the FCNN model using two types of polarizers with 2D graphene oxide (GO) and molybdenum disulfide (MoS2). Results show that, compared to conventional mode simulation approach, our approach can not only reduce the overall computing time by about 4 orders of magnitude, but also achieve highly accurate FOM predictions with an average deviation of less than 0.04. In addition, the measured FOM values for the fabricated devices show good agreement with the predicted ones, with discrepancies remaining below 0.2. These results validate artificial intelligence (AI) as an effective approach for designing and optimizing 2D-material based optical polarizers with high efficiency.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了如何利用机器学习（ML）模型加速二维材料偏振器的设计和优化过程。传统方法需要大量计算资源进行模拟，而作者提出的全连接神经网络（FCNN）模型可以高效预测偏振器的性能指标。
AI.motivation: 传统设计二维材料偏振器的方法依赖于大规模的模式模拟，计算成本高昂且效率低下。作者希望通过机器学习模型减少计算资源需求，同时提高设计效率。
AI.method: 作者开发了一种基于全连接神经网络（FCNN）的ML模型。该模型通过低分辨率结构参数的模拟结果进行训练，能够准确预测高分辨率参数下的偏振器性能指标（FOMs），并快速映射整个参数空间的全局变化趋势。
AI.result: 与传统的模式模拟方法相比，FCNN模型将计算时间减少了约4个数量级，并且FOM预测的平均偏差小于0.04。实验制备的器件测量结果与预测值吻合良好，差异小于0.2。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，AI方法是设计和优化二维材料光学偏振器的高效途径，能够显著提高计算效率和设计准确性。

title: Fluctuation imaging of disorder in monolayer semiconductors
summary: Monolayer semiconductors hold great potential for nanoscale electronics, optoelectronics, and photonics. Excitons dominate their optical properties. As their electric fields extend outside the monolayer, they are sensitive to their surroundings. Thus, disorder can cause exciton instability, which is detrimental to device performance and critical for scalability and reproducibility. Here, we adapt a super-resolution fluorescence fluctuation microscopy technique to image localized exciton fluctuations in monolayer semiconductors, allowing us to identify unstable spots in an otherwise continuous monolayer with constant fluorescence. These spots correspond to interfacial disorder measured by atomic force microscopy. We examine how different material interfaces influence the fluctuations by comparing several substrates and provide additional insight into the disorder behind the fluctuations using hyperspectral imaging. We also assess the reduction of disorder upon thermal annealing, evidenced by a decrease in fluctuations. Our results show that fluorescence fluctuation imaging can detect disorder features similar to those of atomic force microscopy and hyperspectral imaging, while being faster and easier to implement. Therefore, it is a promising method for evaluating the quality of monolayer semiconductors, particularly when integrated with nanostructures and heterostructures found in nano-optoelectronic devices.

title: Supercontinuum generation in 2D graphene oxide film coated SiN waveguides
summary: Enhanced supercontinuum generation (SCG) is experimentally demonstrated in integrated silicon nitride (Si3N4) waveguides incorporating highly nonlinear graphene oxide (GO) in the form of two dimensional (2D) films. Onchip integration of the 2D GO films with precise control of their thickness is realized by using a transfer free and layer by layer coating method. The control of the film length and coating position is achieved via window opening in the upper silica cladding of the photonic integrated chips. Detailed SCG measurements are performed using the fabricated devices with different waveguide geometries and GO film thicknesses, and the results are compared with devices without GO. Significantly improved spectral broadening of ultrashort optical pulses with ultrahigh peaks powers exceeding 1000 W is observed for the hybrid devices, achieving up to 2.4 times improvement in the spectral bandwidth relative to devices without GO. Theoretical analyses for the influence of GO film thickness, coating length, coating position, and waveguide geometry are also provided by fitting the experimental results with theory, showing that there is still significant room for further improvement. This work opens up a promising new avenue towards improving the SCG performance of photonic integrated devices by incorporating functional 2D materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在硅氮化物波导中集成高非线性氧化石墨烯二维薄膜，实验证明了超连续谱生成的显著增强。通过无转移层层涂覆方法精确控制薄膜厚度，并利用光芯片上二氧化硅包层开口控制薄膜长度和涂覆位置。实验表明，集成氧化石墨烯的设备在超短光脉冲的频谱展宽上比无氧化石墨烯的设备有最高2.4倍的提升。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在解决光集成器件中超连续谱生成性能不足的问题。通过引入高非线性的二维氧化石墨烯薄膜，探索提升超连续谱生成效率的新途径，为高性能光子集成器件的开发提供新思路。
AI.method: 采用无转移层层涂覆方法，精确控制氧化石墨烯薄膜的厚度，并通过二氧化硅包层开口控制薄膜的长度和涂覆位置。实验测试了不同波导几何结构和氧化石墨烯薄膜厚度的器件，并与未集成氧化石墨烯的器件进行了对比分析。此外，理论模型用于拟合实验数据，分析了薄膜厚度、涂覆长度、涂覆位置和波导几何结构对性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，集成氧化石墨烯的设备在超短光脉冲（峰值功率超过1000 W）的频谱展宽上表现出显著提升，最高达到未集成氧化石墨烯设备的2.4倍带宽。理论分析指出，通过优化薄膜厚度和涂覆位置等参数，性能仍有进一步提升的空间。
AI.conclusion: 通过将功能化的二维材料（如氧化石墨烯）集成到光子集成器件中，本文为提升超连续谱生成性能开辟了新的途径。实验和理论分析的结合表明，这种方法具有进一步优化的潜力，为未来高性能光子集成器件的设计提供了重要参考。

title: Resonances in light scattering from nonequilibrium dipoles pairs
summary: We consider the light scattering from a pair of point-like electrical dipoles. Whenever the polarizability of each dipole violates the optical theorem, the response of the pair (both in far-field and near-field) exhibits exact resonances as a function of the frequency and the inter-dipole distance. This polarizability is consistent with causality and the crossing condition (i.e., a real field generates a real response). Hence, the emergence of the resonances requires nonequilibrium conditions, e.g., corresponding to active dipoles. Within our approach (classical optics, monochromatic incident field, point-like dipoles), the exact resonances can be infinite. The resonances also appear in the equilibrium domain, where the optical theorem is valid. In that domain, they are finite, but can produce large amplification factors; e.g., for a pair of metallic nanoparticles under Drude's model, the single-particle plasmonic resonance can be amplified $\sim 10^{2}$ times. But the global maximization of the scattering can still be achieved by violating the optical theorem. Our results for one electric and one magnetic dipole show how resonances can amplify a weak magnetic response of a single dipole to the incident field. We also discuss an anti-resonance (dark-state) effect present in the two-dipole scattering.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一对点状电偶极子的光散射问题，发现当偶极子的极化率违反光学定理时，系统响应（远场和近场）会表现出频率和偶粒子间距离的精确共振。这种极化率符合因果性和交叉条件（即真实场产生真实响应），而共振的出现需要非平衡条件。此外，在平衡域内，共振虽有限但可产生大放大因子。结果显示，共振可以放大单偶极子的弱磁响应，并探讨了双偶极子散射中的反共振（暗态）效应。
AI.motivation: 作者试图解决的问题是理解点状电偶极子对的散射行为，特别是当极化率违反光学定理时，系统表现出精确共振的现象。这种共振与非平衡条件密切相关，且在平衡域内也能观察到显著的放大效应。研究还旨在探讨共振如何影响单偶极子的磁响应以及双偶极子散射中的暗态效应。
AI.method: 研究方法基于经典光学理论，采用单色入射场和点状偶极子模型。通过分析偶极子的极化率是否违反光学定理，探讨其在非平衡和平衡条件下的共振行为。还研究了由一个电偶极子和一个磁偶极子组成的系统，以观察共振对磁响应的放大作用以及暗态效应的出现。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，违反光学定理时，双偶极子系统的响应会出现精确共振，其幅度在非平衡条件下可以为无限大。在平衡域内，共振幅度有限但仍可显著放大（例如金属纳米粒子的等离子共振放大因子可达约100倍）。此外，共振能够放大单偶极子的弱磁响应，而双偶极子散射中还存在反共振（暗态）效应。
AI.conclusion: 本文的结论指出，在违反光学定理的条件下，双偶极子系统的散射响应能够产生精确共振，并在非平衡条件下表现出无限大共振幅度。即使在平衡域内，共振也能显著增强散射效果。此外，共振可以放大磁偶极子的微弱响应，而双偶极子散射中观察到的暗态效应为进一步研究提供了方向。

title: Continuous-streaming high-speed two-photon dual-comb LiDAR with free-running lasers
comment: Submitted for publication. In peer review
summary: Dual-comb distance metrology combines sub-um precision with absolute distance measurement over meter-scale non-ambiguity ranges. The most common interferometric implementation requires sophisticated approaches to achieve continuous streaming due to the need for digitization at near-gigasample/s rates. Here, we exploit the naturally low data burden of two-photon dual-comb LiDAR to demonstrate continuously-streamed distance metrology at 11.5 kHz, reaching a precision of nearly 1 um in an averaging time of 10 ms. Using free-running 500 MHz Er,Yb:glass femtosecond lasers we achieve sampling rates >10 kHz, sufficient to demonstrate the capture of a four-minute audio track from the displacement of a loudspeaker-mounted mirror. The ability to perform high-speed yet low-data-burden distance metrology using unstabilized lasers presents exciting opportunities for diverse applications in industrial machine-tool control and calibration.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用双光光子双频梳LiDAR技术实现高速连续测距的方法，解决了传统干涉测距技术中数据量过大和数字化速率要求高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统双频梳测距技术虽然具有微米级精度和米级无歧义范围的优势，但其实现连续数据流需要接近千兆采样率的高速数字化处理，增加了系统的复杂性。本文旨在通过低数据量的双光光子双频梳LiDAR技术，实现高效连续测距。
AI.method: 作者采用自由运行的500 MHz Er,Yb:glass飞秒激光器作为光源，利用双光光子双频梳LiDAR技术的低数据要求，实现了11.5 kHz的连续测距频率。该方法在10 ms的平均时间内达到了近1微米的测量精度，并通过实验验证了其高速性能，例如捕捉扬声器镜面位移的四分钟音频轨迹。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够实现高于10 kHz的采样率，且数据负担低，适用于工业机器控制和校准等多样化应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过使用非稳定激光器和双光光子双频梳LiDAR技术，本文成功实现了高速、低数据负担的测距，扩展了双频梳测距技术在工业应用中的潜力。

title: Second-harmonic generation holography with polarization multiplexing for label-free collagen characterization and imaging
summary: Digital holography is an interference-based imaging technique capable of recording both the amplitude and phase of an electromagnetic field. It can be obtained at the laser illumination wavelength, but also with second-harmonic generation, since the latter is produced in a coherent process. Here we describe the development of a harmonic holographic microscope for 3D single-shot mapping of second-harmonic emitters. The knowledge of the scattered field, in amplitude and phase, in a given plane, that of the camera, allows its reconstruction in any other plane using the angular spectrum representation of the optical fields, a process called 3D numerical back-propagation. In order to probe the polarization dependence of the sample nonlinear response, we implement polarization multiplexing, in which a Wollaston prism creates two off-axis reference beams with orthogonal polarizations and non-parallel propagation directions. Each reference only interferes with the corresponding polarization component in the sample SHG emission, thus providing two independent sets of interference fringes which are easily separated in the angular spectrum representation. From a single measurement, two second-harmonic fields corresponding to orthogonal polarizations can be back-propagated. In the particular case of collagen, the second-harmonic polarization state can reveal the orientation or disorder of molecules and fibers. We demonstrate the feasibility of the method by reconstructing the spatial distribution of the second-harmonic field generated by collagen fibers in a rat-tail tendon sample and show that polarization-multiplexed holography can provide single-shot 3D mapping of biophysical parameters such as the helical pitch angle of collagen molecules.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种谐波全息显微镜技术，通过单次拍摄实现二次谐波发射体的3D映射，并结合偏振复用技术研究样品的非线性响应。
AI.motivation: 数字全息术是一种能够记录电磁场振幅和相位信息的干涉成像技术，但传统方法难以实现二次谐波发射体的3D单次映射，且缺乏对样品非线性响应的偏振依赖性的研究。
AI.method: 采用谐波全息显微镜技术，结合数值反向传播方法从单次测量中重建二次谐波场。此外，通过沃拉斯顿棱镜实现偏振复用，生成两束正交偏振和不同传播方向的参考光束，从而分离不同偏振分量的干涉条纹。
AI.result: 实验证明了该方法在重建大鼠尾腱胶原纤维二次谐波场的空间分布上的可行性，并展示了偏振复用全息术可用于单次拍摄3D映射胶原分子螺旋角的生物物理参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非线性光学成像提供了新的工具，特别是在生物组织中二次谐波发射体的3D偏振依赖性研究中表现出巨大潜力。

title: Explicit Construction of Floquet-Bloch States from Arbitrary Solution Bases of the Hill Equation
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to Journal of Physics A: Mathematical and Theoretical. Floquet theory, Hill equation, monodromy matrix, transfer matrix, Bloch waves, photonic crystals
summary: For the Hill equation describing one-dimensional periodic systems, a constructive formulation is developed for generating Floquet-Bloch states directly from arbitrary pairs of linearly independent solutions. One-dimensional photonic crystals are used as a concrete illustration. Explicit closed-form formulas map an arbitrary fundamental system to the corresponding Floquet-Bloch basis via the monodromy matrix, including the generic Jordan band-edge case, without reliance on canonically normalized solutions. The construction can be expressed directly in terms of the transfer matrix, making the residual representation freedom transparent and providing an implementation-ready framework for analytical and numerical studies of periodic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文针对描述一维周期系统的Hill方程，提出了一种从任意线性无关解对直接生成Floquet-Bloch态的构造性方法。
AI.motivation: 研究者旨在解决传统方法依赖归一化解的局限性问题，特别是针对一维光子晶体等周期系统，提出了一种更通用且直接的方法来生成Floquet-Bloch基。
AI.method: 通过使用单值矩阵（monodromy matrix），开发了将任意基本系统映射到Floquet-Bloch基的显式闭式公式，适用于一般Jordan带边情况。该方法直接基于转移矩阵，避免了归一化解的依赖。
AI.result: 所提出的方法不仅透明地展示了表示自由度，还为周期系统的解析和数值研究提供了一个可直接实现的框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为周期系统的研究提供了一种更灵活、更普遍的工具，尤其适用于一维光子晶体的分析，同时为其他周期性问题的研究提供了新思路。

title: Ponderomotive Achromat for Electron Optics: Radially Polarized Annular Focusing and a Round-Lens Corrector Regime
summary: Ponderomotive electron optics has recently attracted attention because structured optical fields can provide round-lens operation with functionalities that are difficult to achieve using conventional electron-optical elements, including negative lens power and negative spherical aberration. A largely unexplored aspect is how ponderomotive lenses disperse with electron energy and whether that dispersion can be engineered for achromatization. Here we show that, for relativistic electrons, longitudinal and transverse optical components exhibit distinct energy dispersion because Lorentz-boost-induced polarization mixing modifies the effective lens action. Focusing a radially polarized annular beam produces two co-located Bessel-like components near focus, a transverse $J_1^2$ lens and a longitudinal component with relativistic mixing, forming a zero-separation doublet. Using a local Abbe number defined in the energy domain, we derive a single geometry condition for achromatization and evaluate the spot-size performance in a thin-lens model. We also identify parameter regions where the same element yields negative on-axis chromatic aberration, indicating a compact round-lens corrector regime.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于结构光学场的电子光学中色差校正问题，重点分析了相对论电子能量分散特性及其工程化调控的可能性。
AI.motivation: 传统的电子光学元件难以实现某些特定功能（如负透镜功率和负球差），而结构光学场为此提供了新的可能性。然而，电子能量分散及其色差调控仍是一个未被充分探索的领域。本文旨在解决这一问题，深入研究相对论电子在结构光学场中的能量分散特性及其对色差的影响。
AI.method: 通过分析纵向和横向光学分量的能量分散特性，作者利用洛伦兹变换导致的极化混合效应，设计了一种零分离双合透镜结构，并通过定义局部阿贝数推导出色差校正的几何条件。此外，本文还使用薄透镜模型评估了光斑尺寸性能，并探讨了负轴上色差的参数区域。
AI.result: 研究表明，通过调控光学场的几何参数，可以实现色差校正（achromatization），甚至在特定参数区域实现负轴上色差，为紧凑型圆形透镜校正器提供了可能性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论分析和模型验证，证明了结构光学场在相对论电子光学中可以实现色差工程化调控，尤其是零分离双合透镜结构为实现色差校正和负色差提供了新的技术路径。这一研究为未来电子光学器件的设计与优化奠定了理论基础。

title: Fourier Transform Infrared microspectroscopy-based super-resolution virtual staining of unlabeled tissues by pixel Diffusion Transformer
summary: Here, we present a diffusion transformer (DiT)-based pixel super-resolution virtual staining approach to transform low-resolution FTIR microspectroscopic images of the unstained tissues into corresponding high-resolution H&E-stained images. Unlike conventional conditional DiT architectures, this method models the transformation from FTIR images to H&E-stained images as a stochastic Brownian bridge process and directly learns the cross-domain translation in pixel space by means of a large-patch Transformer. When applied to FTIR images of unlabeled human lung tissue samples, the proposed method successfully transforms them into high-resolution H&E-stained images, achieving a 4 times pixel-level super-resolution. Additionally, by partitioning images into large patches, our method achieves a fourfold improvement in inference speed compared with traditional U-Net-based diffusion models, without compromising the quality of generated images. This super-resolution virtual staining method provides a rapid and effective solution for generating high-resolution, clinically usable H&E-stained images from infrared spectroscopic images, which can significantly facilitate the incorporation of FTIR microspectroscopy into clinical histological scenarios.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种基于扩散变压器（DiT）的像素级超分辨率虚拟染色方法，能够将未经染色的低分辨率FTIR显微光谱图像转换为高分辨率的H&E染色图像。该方法通过建模为随机布朗桥过程，并使用大型补丁Transformer直接学习跨域转换，显著提高了图像质量和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 传统的虚拟染色方法在从FTIR显微光谱图像生成H&E染色图像时，往往面临分辨率低和计算效率不足的问题。作者希望通过结合扩散模型和Transformer技术，设计一种能够同时提升图像分辨率和生成速度的方法，以满足临床组织学分析的需求。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种新的扩散变压器架构，将FTIR图像到H&E图像的转换建模为随机布朗桥过程，并使用大型补丁Transformer直接在像素空间中学习跨域映射。与传统方法相比，该方法通过图像分块处理显著提升了推理速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法成功将FTIR图像转换为高分辨率H&E染色图像，实现了4倍的像素级超分辨率，同时推理速度比传统U-Net扩散模型提高了4倍，且生成图像质量未受影响。
AI.conclusion: 这种超分辨率虚拟染色方法提供了一种快速有效的解决方案，能够从红外光谱图像生成临床可用的高分辨率H&E染色图像，有望进一步推动FTIR显微光谱技术在临床组织学中的应用。

title: Nanosecond wavefront shaping to focus through agitated turbid media
summary: Multiple scattering rapidly scrambles optical fields in fog, snow and turbid water, causing op- timized wavefront corrections to become obsolete on microsecond timescales. Although wavefront shaping enables focusing through static scattering layers, closed-loop control in dynamically evolving media has remained experimentally challenging because the correction bandwidth must approach the intrinsic decorrelation rate of the speckle. Here, we demonstrate closed-loop wavefront shaping with 32 independent degrees of freedom in an agitated turbid medium exhibiting sub-microsecond decorrelation. The medium thickness exceeds the transport mean free path, meaning the far-field speckle autocorrelation is limited to a diffraction-sized grain. Despite the microsecond decorrelation and this multiple-scattering regime, stable focusing is maintained as the correction cycle approaches the intrinsic dynamics of the medium. These results establish an experimentally accessible regime for coherent wave control in rapidly evolving complex media.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在快速动态散射介质中实现闭环波前整形的问题，通过32个独立的自由度在微秒级去相关时间内实现稳定聚焦，为相干波控制在快速变化的复杂介质中提供了实验可行的方案。
AI.motivation: 多散射介质（如雾、雪和浊水）会迅速扰乱光学场，使优化波前校正在微秒时间尺度内失效。尽管波前整形技术已在静态散射层中实现了聚焦，但在动态变化的介质中实现闭环控制仍具有实验挑战性，因为校正带宽需要接近散斑的固有去相关速率。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种闭环波前整形方法，使用了32个独立的自由度来控制动态散射介质中的波前。介质厚度超过传输平均自由程，远场散斑自相关仅限于衍射大小的颗粒。尽管介质具有微秒级的去相关特性且处于多重散射状态，但仍能通过接近介质固有动力学的校正周期实现稳定聚焦。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够在微秒级去相关时间内实现稳定聚焦，即使在多重散射条件下也能维持良好的控制效果。这表明该方法为相干波控制在快速变化的复杂介质中提供了一种实验可行的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 论文的结论是，通过闭环波前整形技术，能够在快速动态变化的散射介质中实现稳定的相干波控制。这一结果为复杂介质中的光学控制和成像应用开辟了新的可能性。

title: Large differential attosecond delays in solid state photoemission
summary: Time-resolved photoelectron spectroscopy provides access to the electronic structure and non-equilibrium electron dynamics in matter. At solid surfaces photoemission dynamics can be investigated on its natural time scale by measuring attosecond time delays of emitted electrons. Photoelectrons with final state energies of several tens of eV need tens to hundreds of attoseconds to be released into the vacuum. Competing effects determine the emission dynamics and, hence, the full picture of the process is still under debate. The rather large energy differences between the final states probed in commonly reported relative photoemission delays obscure their complex fine structure and hinders the interpretation of the measurements. Here we report differential attosecond delays $τ_{\mathrm{DAD}}$, i.e., relative photoemission delays for energetically close-lying spin-orbit split states. Differential attosecond delays on the order of 30 to 100 as for Bi 5d, Te 4d, and Se 3d core level photoemission from Bi$_2$Te$_3$ and Bi$_2$Se$_3$ can neither be attributed to intra-atomic delays, nor to ballistic transport and subsequent emission. Instead, calculations based on the one-step photoemission theory reveal that photoemission delays vary strongly on the energy scale of the spin-orbit splitting and quantitatively match experimental observations. This strong variation arises from multiple scattering at the surface leading to final states that involve both evanescent and propagating Bloch waves. Their relative amplitudes vary strongly affecting thereby the timing of the photoemission event since evanescent and propagating components exhibit inherently different dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微分阿秒延迟（DAD）技术研究了Bi₂Te₃和Bi₂Se₃中Bi 5d、Te 4d和Se 3d核心能级的光电子发射动力学，揭示了表面多重散射对光电子发射时间的影响。
AI.motivation: 通常在相对光电子发射延迟测量中，终态能量差异较大，掩盖了其复杂的精细结构，难以解释实验结果。作者旨在通过测量能量相近的自旋轨道分裂态的微分阿秒延迟，揭示光电子发射动力学的详细机制。
AI.method: 采用微分阿秒延迟（DAD）技术测量Bi₂Te₃和Bi₂Se₃中Bi 5d、Te 4d和Se 3d核心能级的相对光电子发射延迟，并基于一步光发射理论进行计算模拟，以对比实验结果。
AI.result: 实验观察到30到100阿秒的微分阿秒延迟，无法用简单的原子内延迟或弹道传输解释。理论计算表明，光电子发射延迟在自旋轨道分裂的能量尺度上变化剧烈，这与实验结果定量吻合，原因是表面多重散射导致终态既包括衰逝波也包括传播布洛赫波。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，光电子发射延迟在能量相近的状态下表现出显著变化，主要由表面多重散射效应驱动。这一发现为理解光电子发射动力学提供了新的视角。

title: Spectrum Phase and Constraints on THz-Optical klystron
summary: Optical klystrons provide an efficient mechanism for enhancing coherent radiation through laser-induced microbunching and dispersive amplification. In the terahertz (THz) regime and at low beam energy, however, the radiation wavelength becomes comparable to the characteristic wavelengths of longitudinal space-charge (LSC) and coherent synchrotron radiation (CSR) driven microbunching. In this work, we analyze the impact of electron-beam microbunching on the spectral amplitude and phase of a seeded optical klystron operating in the THz regime. Using a phase-space formalism, incoherent energy modulations generated by collective effects are shown to enter the bunching spectrum as a stochastic longitudinal phase, producing local wavenumber jitter and spectral broadening. An explicit connection between the microbunching-induced energy modulation and LSC/CSR gain is established for low-energy beams, demonstrating that the overlap between collective-effect wavelengths and the optical-klystron radiation wavelength leads to strong spectral phase distortion. These effects impose fundamental constraints on the achievable harmonic bunching and spectral purity and stability of THz optical klystrons and must be considered in the design and optimization of next-generation low-energy THz FEL facilities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在太赫兹（THz）频段和低束流能量下，光学速调管的相干辐射增强机制中电子束微束聚对光谱幅度和相位的影响，指出集体效应导致的光谱相位失真对谐波束聚和光谱纯度及稳定性的限制。
AI.motivation: 在THz频段和低束流能量下，辐射波长与纵向空间电荷（LSC）和相干同步辐射（CSR）驱动的微束聚的特征波长相当。这种重叠可能导致光谱相位失真，进而影响光学速调管的性能和稳定性，因此需要深入研究其对辐射光谱的影响。
AI.method: 作者采用了相空间形式化方法，分析了集体效应产生的非相干能量调制如何以随机纵向相位的形式进入束聚光谱，并建立了微束聚诱导的能量调制与LSC/CSR增益之间的明确联系。
AI.result: 研究表明，集体效应波长与光学速调管辐射波长的重叠会导致强烈的光谱相位失真，从而对谐波束聚和光谱纯度及稳定性产生根本性限制。这些效应在设计和优化下一代低能量THz自由电子激光（FEL）设施时必须加以考虑。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了在THz频段和低束流能量下，光学速调管中集体效应对光谱相位的影响，强调了在设计高性能THz FEL设施时需重视这些效应的约束作用。

title: Scaling law from orbital angular momentum conservation in harmonic and high-order harmonic generation driven by spatiotemporal light fields
summary: Nonlinear photon upconversion processes driven by diverse forms of structured light are receiving increasing attention. In harmonic and high-order harmonic generation (HG and HHG) with Laguerre-Gauss (LG) beams, linear scaling the driver topological charge (TC) with the harmonic order is equivalent to driver orbital angular momentum (OAM) per photon scaling, and constitutes a proof of OAM conservation. However, with generic driving fields, such as non-LG vortices or spatiotemporal optical vortices, TC and OAM per photon may scale or not in a process in which the OAM is conserved. We find the physical magnitude that scales with generality when the OAM, either longitudinal or transverse, or its intrinsic part, is conserved. This new rule allows for the wealth of phenomena observed in HHG that are unintelligible from the rigid LG rule.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非线性光子上转换过程中轨道角动量（OAM）守恒的问题，尤其是在非拉盖尔-高斯光束（如非LG涡旋或时空光学涡旋）驱动的情况下，提出了一个新的普适量来描述OAM守恒时物理量的标度关系。
AI.motivation: 作者试图解决的问题是在非线性光子上转换过程中（如谐波和高阶谐波生成），使用非拉盖尔-高斯光束（如非LG涡旋或时空光学涡旋）驱动时，拓扑荷（TC）和每个光子的轨道角动量（OAM）的标度关系与OAM守恒之间的矛盾。现有的规则局限于LG光束，无法解释更广泛驱动场中观察到的现象。
AI.method: 通过分析非线性过程中OAM（无论是纵向还是横向或内禀部分）守恒的条件，作者提出了一个新的普适量来描述OAM守恒时的物理量标度关系。这一方法超越了传统的LG光束的限制，适用于更广泛的驱动场类型。
AI.result: 研究表明，这一新的普适量可以有效解释在更广泛驱动场（如非LG涡旋或时空光学涡旋）中高阶谐波生成（HHG）过程中观察到的现象，而这些现象在传统的LG规则下是无法理解的。
AI.conclusion: 论文得出结论，提出了一种新的普适量来描述OAM守恒时物理量的标度关系，从而扩展了对非线性光子上转换过程的理解。这一发现为理解复杂驱动场中的谐波生成提供了新的理论基础，并揭示了超越传统LG规则的现象。

title: Knife-edge removal in schlieren imaging
summary: A knife-edge is recognized as a critical component of the schlieren imaging system. This knife-edge serves as a cutoff element, which is required to achieve high sensitivity in the schlieren imaging setup. This article describes a method for totally removing the knife-edge from a normal schlieren imaging system while maintaining the same sensitivity. In this approach, the camera lens's internal aperture acts like the cutoff element making an external knife-edge redundant. This method simplifies the schlieren setup and also reduces the setup cost due to the reduced number of optical or optomechanical elements. We show flow visualization data that clearly demonstrate that schlieren contrast can be obtained by employing a lens's internal aperture as the cutoff.

title: Mid-Infrared Modulation of Quantum Emitters in Hexagonal Boron Nitride
summary: Single photon emitters (SPEs) are promising building blocks for practical devices in quantum technologies. Traditionally, these systems are excited using off-resonant visible light through their phonon transitions, yet this process remains poorly understood. Here, we explore the interaction of mid-infrared (MIR) excitation on the properties of SPEs in hexagonal boron nitride. Notably, we present a reversible, non-destructive method to enhance emission from blue SPEs using MIR co-excitation. By resonantly driving defect-localized in-plane infrared-active optical phonon modes near 7.3 um, the MIR field modulates carrier dynamics through a phonon-assisted recombination. This unique feature, not observed previously for defects in solids, is a promising reservoir in a growing toolkit to modulate quantum emitters at room temperature for their use in practical quantum technologies.

title: Recent advances in spatial light modulator-based three-dimensional optical imaging (Invited)
summary: Phase-only spatial light modulators (SLMs) are used in optical systems for several purposes. In this article, the main landmarks of SLM-based imaging systems are surveyed. In addition to conventional two-dimensional imaging, these systems are useful for multidimensional imaging, axial sectioning, field-of-view expansion, improved image resolution, imaging through scatterers, and depth-of-field control. The SLMs in this review are positioned in the system aperture and modulate the input light in various ways to achieve different imaging goals. This review begins with the nearly 20-year-old Fresnel incoherent correlation holography system, continues with coded-aperture holography, and progresses to the most recent versions of interferenceless coded-aperture holography systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于空间光调制器（SLM）的成像系统的里程碑，包括多维成像、轴向切片、视场扩展、分辨率提升、散射体成像及景深控制等应用，并追溯从20年前的菲涅尔非相干相关全息系统到最新的无干涉编码孔径全息系统的进展。
AI.motivation: 空间光调制器（SLM）在光学系统中具有多种用途，但目前缺乏对其在成像系统中应用的全面总结和分析。作者希望通过综述SLM在成像系统中的关键里程碑，为研究人员提供一个系统的技术发展脉络和应用前景。
AI.method: 作者采用文献综述的方法，系统梳理了SLM在成像系统中的发展历程和应用案例。从早期的菲涅尔非相干相关全息系统，到编码孔径全息技术，再到最新的无干涉编码孔径全息系统，分析其技术特点和实现方式。
AI.result: 通过综述发现，SLM在成像系统中展现出多维成像、轴向切片、视场扩展等多种功能，且技术从传统全息发展到无需干涉的更高效系统，证明了其在光学成像领域的广泛应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: SLM在成像系统中具有多样化的应用和技术路线，未来发展将进一步优化其性能和功能。本文为相关研究提供了系统参考，并为后续技术改进指明了方向。

title: Heterogeneously Integrated Diamond-on-Lithium Niobate Quantum Photonic Platform
summary: Diamond photonics has enabled efficient interfaces for quantum memories and is predicted to be a critical component of quantum networks. However, scalable network architectures require spatial, temporal, and spectral control of photons, which relies on nonlinear and electro-optic functionalities that diamond alone cannot provide. Here, we demonstrate heterogeneous integration of a thin-film lithium niobate (TFLN) platform, which has strong chi-2 nonlinearity and electro-optic effects, with thin diamond films. We demonstrate high-Q diamond photonic crystal cavities (Q factors exceeding 5x10^4 at 735 nm) that are lithographically aligned with TFLN photonic backbone and critically coupled to it. This allows us to realize low-loss diamond-TFLN "escalators" (loss ~1 dB/coupler) that support efficient light transfer between them. At cryogenic temperatures (5K), we can collect photons emitted from silicon vacancies (SiVs) embedded within the diamond structure via the TFLN photonic circuit. This approach establishes a scalable route toward integrated photonic circuits for practical quantum networking and other technologies.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了将具有强非线性效应的薄层锂铌酸盐（TFLN）薄膜与金刚石薄膜异质集成的方法，以实现高效的光子传输和量子网络应用。
AI.motivation: 金刚石光子学在量子存储器接口中表现出色，但缺乏空间、时间和光谱控制能力。为了解决这一问题，作者提出将金刚石薄膜与TFLN平台集成，以利用TFLN的非线性和电光效应。
AI.method: 通过光刻对准技术，将高Q因子金刚石光子晶体腔（Q因子超过5x10^4）与TFLN光子背板耦合，实现低损耗（~1 dB/耦合器）的光子传输。
AI.result: 在低温（5K）条件下，成功通过TFLN光子电路收集嵌入金刚石结构中的硅空位（SiVs）光子。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为集成光子电路提供了可扩展的解决方案，适用于量子网络和其他技术。

title: Experimental investigation of Lévy flights for step-length distributions with a length-dependent local power exponent
summary: We experimentally investigate the transmission of light by dense atomic vapor. The light propagating in dense atomic vapor can be modeled as a Lévy flight random walk. For such system, the step-length distribution can be modeled as $P(\ell)\sim \ell^{-1-α(\ell)}$, with the Lévy index $α(\ell)$ varying smoothly with the step length. Moreover, the walkers alternate between two distinct distributions depending on the occurrence of collisions between atoms in the light scattering. title: Low Reflectance All-Glass Metasurface Lenses Based on Laser Self-generated Nanoparticles
summary: Optical metasurfaces, comprised of subwavelength nanostructures, hold a great promise to high-power laser optics but also a limited pertinence due to their currently limited aperture size, throughput and durability. Here, an alternative approach is presented, reliant on laser-controlled self-organizing mask formation followed by ion etching which results in an all-fused-silica-glass metasurface. Two 1 mm diameter optical elements (an axicon lens and a shadower) are fabricated and their optical performance is validated at 532 nm wavelength with an extremely low broadband reflection (<0.15%) - a result of the unique metasurface elements shape. The self-organizing working principle enables producing large amounts of nano-elements at-once, thus a path for aperture scaleup. It also enables generation of sub-100 nm nanoelements, thus a path to short wavelengths operation. Two key advancements towards viability are presented: a laser scan with in-situ transmission feedback enables patterning the etching mask to a prescribed nanoparticle distribution, and a crafted beyond-mask-erosion-point etching of the mask enables increasing the metasurface phase difference to at least pi, while keeping extremely low reflection across it. This paves a path to high-power lasers optics, requiring large aperture, high throughput and laser light durability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于激光控制自组织掩模形成和离子刻蚀的全熔融石英玻璃超表面制备方法，解决了传统光学超表面在孔径尺寸、通量和耐久性方面的限制。通过制备并验证了两个直径为1 mm的光学元件（轴锥透镜和遮光器），展示了在532 nm波长下极低的宽带反射率（<0.15%）。该方法通过自组织原理实现了大规模纳米结构的批量制备和短波长操作的可能。
AI.motivation: 传统的光学超表面由于其孔径尺寸小、通量低和耐久性不足，难以满足高功率激光光学的要求。本文旨在提出一种新的制备方法，以解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用激光控制的自组织掩模形成技术，随后进行离子刻蚀，制备全熔融石英玻璃超表面。通过激光扫描结合实时透射反馈，精确控制刻蚀掩模的纳米颗粒分布；并通过超出掩模侵蚀点的刻蚀技术，将超表面的相位差提升至至少π，同时保持极低的反射率。
AI.result: 制备的1 mm直径光学元件在532 nm波长下表现出极低的宽带反射率（<0.15%），展示了该方法在光学性能上的优越性。此外，该方法支持大规模纳米结构的批量制备，为短波长操作和大孔径超表面的制备提供了可能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自组织和离子刻蚀技术为高功率激光光学提供了一条可行的路径，解决了传统超表面的局限性，展示了在大孔径、高通量和耐久性方面的潜力。
